location_description: Gas meter room behind cafeteria kitchen
shutoff_instructions: Turn main valve 90 degrees clockwise until perpendicular to the pipe

location_description: Main electrical panel in boiler room off cafeteria
shutoff_instructions: Throw MAIN breaker to OFF; sub-panels labeled by wing

location_description: East wing sub-panel in east stairwell closet
shutoff_instructions: Flip EAST-WING main to OFF; does not cut fire alarm

location_description: Water main shutoff in mechanical room near main entrance
shutoff_instructions: Turn main gate valve fully clockwise; may take several turns

location_description: HVAC control panel in mechanical room
shutoff_instructions: Press EMERGENCY STOP to halt air handlers (stops smoke spread)

location_description: Fire sprinkler riser room near main entrance
shutoff_instructions: Do NOT close unless directed by fire department; PIV valve outside Door 2
key_location: Fire dept Knox box at Door 2
